docs.title: Introduction
docs.text:
Hi, I am Sushant, a backend developer focusing on system design, Postgresql and Linux based environments. I have experience in designing and building backend services from the ground up, configuring Nginx, automating, optimizing and benchmarking systems and can work efficiently using the command line. I am currently enrolled in Masters in Science, Computer Networking and Cyber Security

Resume

docs.title: Skills
docs.text:
1. Python
    • Poetry
    • Django
    • Pandas
    • Flask
    • Selenium
    • Websocket
    • Celery
  2. Rust
    • Tokio
    • Serde
    • Sqlx
    • Actix
  3. Nginx
    • Revserse Proxy
    • Load balancing
    • Caching
  4. Postgresql
    • Indexes
    • Replication and backups
    • Cluster and Vacuum
    • Benchmarking queries using Explain Analyze
  5. Linux
    • Server Administration
    • Shell scripting
    • Automation and cron job
    • Package management using apt, apk, pacman
    • File systems and permissions
    • Process management using systemd and supervisor
  6. Message Brokers
    • Kafka
    • RabbitMQ
  7. Docker
    • Volume management
    • CI/CD for automated build and deployment
    • Multi stage build
